what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata card for an image asset in the design-source channel; it records identifiers, blob pointer, MIME type, authorship, creation time, and a SOURCE design ground-truth label for deck1-2026/p-06.jpg.
observations: YAML frontmatter defines id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, dimensions, source, author_session, created, and links
The image MIME is image/jpeg and the blob is blob://b2:cbb461ed1daef02c3e97bc6a48e9940d
Body text explicitly calls the file a SOURCE design ground-truth entry for deck1-2026/p-06.jpg
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image record
Explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' label in the body
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata
Names the ledger file with the pattern image__{channel}_{path}.md
References media via blob:// URI and channel address via image:// scheme
concerns: Image dimensions are recorded as 0, which may be a placeholder or ingestion issue
No links or relationships are provided
The asset's visual/content meaning is not described
notes: A metadata stub for a design-source JPEG with unset dimensions, no outgoing links, and a ground-truth source label.
questions: Why are the width and height 0 for an image record?
What visual content does deck1-2026/p-06.jpg contain?
Are the empty links intentional or incomplete?
Who or what consumes this ledger entry?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated SOURCE design ground-truth purpose matches the actual content: it is a metadata record pointing to a design-source image asset.
intention_signals: The file appears intended to create a canonical, attributable ledger reference for a single design deck image, separating metadata from the actual image blob.
novelty: The combination of image:// channel addressing, blob:// content addressing, and an explicit SOURCE ground-truth label, with placeholder zero dimensions.
contribution: This file contributes a ground-truth metadata anchor for one image asset, providing a stable blob pointer, authorship, timestamp, and channel classification that a fused system can use to resolve and attribute the image without relying on file-system paths alone.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the JPEG image deck1-2026/p-06 in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:cbb461ed1daef02c3e97bc6a48e9940d, with zero dimensions, no links, and a SOURCE design ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide a canonical, attributable pointer to a design-source image asset within a deck.
